title: Global Notes
description: Noteblocks play without distance based volume.
body:
## This is not technically global, as that is controlled server side.

### Then what does Global Notes do?

They make notes not get quieter with distance. However, are limited by the range at which note sounds will not play entirely.

---

<details>
<summary>How Global Notes works.</summary>

Global Notes works by editing the sounds.json to not decrease the volume over distance.

This will preserve directional audio.

</details>

---

For a version without directional audio, check [Global Notes Studio](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/global-notes-studio 'Global Notes Studio on Modrinth')

Version compatibility has been roughly double checked and the pack version warning can be ignored in the versions stated in the release.
